parents.subject: LU-17528 gss: cleanup gss api usage

commit.subject: LU-9859 libcfs: move libcfs hash to obdclass
commit.message:
LU-9859 libcfs: move libcfs hash to obdclass

For some time the Lustre hash code has only been used
by the lustre core code itself. Since this is the case
move the code out of libcfs into obdclass.

Test-Parameters: trivial
Change-Id: Ic6175a6d405d11e9a6ad425392d3b58cdbdca55a
Signed-off-by: James Simmons <jsimmons@infradead.org>
